articles.title: BlackRock will file for both Solana and XRP ETFs, Nate Geraci
articles.description: BlackRock, the world’s largest asset manager, is expected to enter the Solana and XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF) market, according to Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store. In an X post this Friday, Geraci predicted that BlackRock would file for both Solana and XRP ETFs, with Solana coming “any day” and XRP likely after the […]

articles.title: ZKsync sunsets ‘Ignite’ token rewards for DeFi ecosystem, cites market conditions and focus on Elastic Network
articles.description: The committee said that prioritizing technology development for native interoperability across ZKSync's Elastic Network is crucial.

articles.title: SEC May Reclassify XRP as Commodity, Boosting Market Hopes
articles.description: The SEC is considering reclassifying XRP as a commodity, potentially easing regulations and boosting market confidence amid Ripple’s ongoing legal battle.

articles.title: XRP News: New Proposal Seeks SEC Settlement with Ripple by Classifying XRP as a Payment Network
articles.description: The post XRP News: New Proposal Seeks SEC Settlement with Ripple by Classifying XRP as a Payment Network appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News On March 14, Maximilian Staudinger presented a proposal to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) about using XRP as a key financial tool in the U.S. economy.
